prompt: A crumpled gas station receipt from "Shell Station #4821" on Route 66, Arizona. Items: 12.347 gal Regular Unleaded @ $3.89/gal: $48.03, 1 Red Bull: $3.29, 1 Beef Jerky: $4.99. Total: $56.31. The receipt is sun-bleached and has tire marks from being dropped on asphalt, photographed next to a motorcycle helmet.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a heavily crumpled, sun-bleached, and dirt-stained gas station receipt lying on rough asphalt. The receipt displays distinct tire marks across its surface. Clearly visible text on the receipt should read: "Shell Station #4821", "Route 66, Arizona", "12.347 gal Regular Unleaded @ $3.89/gal: $48.03", "1 Red Bull: $3.29", "1 Beef Jerky: $4.99", and "Total: $56.31". Position a dark, scuffed motorcycle helmet immediately to the right of the receipt. The scene should be lit by harsh sunlight, casting short shadows.
objects: Heavily crumpled, sun-bleached, dirt-stained gas station receipt
Distinct tire marks across the receipt
Text on receipt: "12.347 gal Regular Unleaded @ $3.89/gal: $48.03"
Dark, scuffed motorcycle helmet immediately to the right of the receipt
